programme.desc: A travelling salesman is harassed by a menacing 40-ton truck on a remote desert highway.

programme.title: Tina
programme.desc: A documentary that covers exclusive access to the Grammy Award-winning artist Tina Turner, to celebrate her career.

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: A dark but feel-good comedy starring Tom Hanks as a grumpy loner who goes around telling people to follow the rules. Underneath his cranky nature is something deeper—what’s made him turn out like this?

programme.title: Where The Crawdads Sing
programme.desc: Kya, an abandoned girl who raised herself in dangerous marshlands, opens herself to a new world when she is drawn to two young men from town. When one is found dead, she is cast as the main suspect.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Benefit Of The Doubt
programme.desc: Jesse finds himself struggling to get his job back as the Paradise police chief, and he is forced to rely on his cop intuition to sort through a maze of misleading clues.

programme.title: Moneyball
programme.desc: Oakland A’s general manager Billy Beane attempts to build a competitive baseball team on a tight budget, using computer-driven analysis to recruit undervalued players and challenge the traditional way the game is run.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias
programme.desc: Six women in a small Southern town share gossip and solve problems at the local beauty salon, supporting each other through life’s ups and downs.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: An ambitious young Harvard Law graduate gets a lucrative offer from a prestigious firm — a dream job with nightmarish strings attached.

programme.title: The Craigslist Killer
programme.desc: Seemingly flawless medical student Philip Markoff leads a double life and starts to descend into a world of gambling, crime, battery and murder, all while meeting his victims through Craigslist.

programme.title: The Lighthouse
programme.desc: From acclaimed filmmaker Robert Eggers, comes a spellbinding and atmospheric drama about a pair of lighthouse keepers on a desolate New England island in the 1890s.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Death On Duty
programme.desc: A psychologist and former prosecutor helps a detective investigate the murder of a former Marine.

programme.title: Open Season: Scared Silly
programme.desc: Elliot, Boog, and their friends return when a case of mistaken identity leads everyone to believe a monster is in the forest, putting the animals at risk as a former hunter takes advantage of the situation.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: Join the fun when the Little family adopts an adorably spunky boy named Stuart, who looks a lot like a mouse. But, Snowbell, the family cat wants Stuart out of the house ... permanently!

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
programme.desc: When Mr Peabody and Sherman break the rules of time travel by meeting many of history's greatest characters, they must repair the damage they have done before it changes their world forever.

programme.title: How To Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: Set in the mythical world of burly Vikings and fire-breathing dragons, a Viking teenager takes in an injured dragon and sees an opportunity to set his tribe on a new course.

programme.title: Sing 2
programme.desc: Buster Moon and his friends must persuade reclusive rock star Clay Calloway to join them for the opening of a new show.

programme.title: Casper
programme.desc: A woman inherits a dark, ruined mansion instead of her father’s fortune and searches for hidden treasure inside. When she encounters ghosts, she hires a specialist to remove them, but soon discovers a young friendly spirit and his more troublesome relatives, leading to an unexpected clash between the living and the dead.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee
programme.desc: Move over, Mary Poppins. Emma Thompson is wonderfully hideous as a mysterious nanny hired to tame seven brats with a feckless father.

programme.title: Over the Hedge
programme.desc: The woodland friends awaken from their long winter's nap to discover that a large, green hedge has cropped up right through the middle of their once-natural habitat.

programme.title: Spirit Untamed
programme.desc: The next chapter in this beloved franchise begins as a young girl finds a connection to her mother's legacy as a trick rider and forms a bond with a wild mustang named Spirit.

programme.title: Mr. Bean's Holiday
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't believe his luck when he wins a camcorder and an all-expense paid holiday to the French Riviera. But during his journey to the south, he falls face first into a series of mishaps.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: A cynical grump goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit.

programme.title: Abominable
programme.desc: When teenage Yi encounters a young Yeti on the roof of her apartment building, she and her friends embark on an epic quest to reunite the magical creature with his family.

programme.title: Puss In Boots
programme.desc: After Puss in Boots was blamed for a bank robbery in San Ricardo, engineered against his wishes by Humpty Dumpty, Puss leaves Humpty to his fate. Now reunited, they try to trust each other again.

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Gloria and Melman are still fighting to get home to their beloved Big Apple. Their journey takes them through Europe where they find the perfect cover, a travelling circus.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: A young bee leaves the hive to explore the world, but when he breaks the rules and talks to humans, it triggers a series of events that change both worlds.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: In a happy neighbourhood with picket fences and rose bushes sits a black house with a dead lawn. In the cellar is a hideout where a dastardly villain is plotting a huge heist - he wants to steal the moon!

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Worried that his half-vampire grandson isn't showing signs of being a vampire, Dracula enlists his friends to put him through "monster-in-training" boot camp.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: After an aptitude test mix-up, Fred Flintstone trades his job as Bronto-crane operator for a vice presidency. An evil executive then plots to use Fred as the fall guy in an embezzlement scheme.

programme.title: Batteries Not Included
programme.desc: An elderly couple, an ex boxer, an artist and a pregnant woman don't want to leave their rundown tenement. When the tenants help two spaceships seeking a power source, the aliens return the favour.

programme.title: Small Soldiers
programme.desc: A teenage boy and his family get caught up in a war between evil toy soldiers and non-human action figures.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite reformed super-villain Gru returns for more adventures with Lucy, their daughters, and the lovably zany minions.

programme.title: The Bad Guys
programme.desc: The Bad Guys are the most notorious criminals in the world, pulling off a lifetime of legendary heists, but can the gang of misfits pull off their biggest job yet - going good?

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Two men get laid off and have to become stay-at-home dads when they can't find jobs. This inspires them to open their own day-care centre.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: A Monster Vacation
programme.desc: Mavis surprises Dracula with a family vacation on a monster cruise ship. Whilst enjoying their time, the unexpected happens when Drac falls for the dangerous Captain of the ship.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: Briar, Bramble and their friend Vick go on an accidental journey into the primitive age. Searching for the way back to the 21st century, they encounter all kinds of dangers and exotic animals.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: A worker ant changes roles with a soldier ant to woo a forbidden princess.

programme.title: The Lost Tiger
programme.desc: Adopted by a wrestler kangaroo family, Teo's life changes when visions guide him to his roots. He sets off on an epic journey to save his homeland from destruction.

programme.title: Minions: The Rise Of Gru
programme.desc: The untold story of one twelve-year-old's dream to become the world's greatest supervillain.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Clumsy and overweight panda, Po, dreams of becoming a kung fu master.

programme.title: Monsters vs Aliens
programme.desc: Follows the adventures of BOB, Link, Dr Cockroach, and Susan as they learn to adapt to a new world and work side-by-side.

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: In search of a new home, the Croods encounter the more sophisticated Betterman family. A new threat forces the two families to set aside their differences to avoid extinction.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit's feud with Mr. McGregor escalates to greater heights than ever before as they rival for the affections of the warm-hearted animal lover who lives next door.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria find themselves in Africa, where Alex meets his long-lost parents. Meanwhile, Makunga, his father's rival, will stop at nothing to be the king of the jungle.

programme.desc: When the Queen and King of Rock Trolls set out to destroy the other music tribes, Poppy and Branch must unite all trolls and save their diverse melodies from becoming extinct.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: As they return to Jumanji to rescue one of their own, nothing is as they expect. They will have to brave parts unknown and unexplored to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: How To Train Your Dragon

programme.title: Beethoven
programme.desc: A vet targets a disaster-prone St Bernard for animal experimentation, and it's up to his family to save the cuddly canine.

programme.title: Captain Underpants: First Epic Movie
programme.desc: George and Harold are fourth-grade BFFs who accidentally hypnotise their principal into believing he's the hero named Captain Underpants. But they must team up to stop a new teacher who is bent on ridding the world of laughter.

programme.title: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: Shrek now finds himself in a twisted, alternate version of Far Far Away, where ogres are hunted, Rumpelstiltskin is king, and Shrek and Fiona have never met. He must undo all he's done to save his world.

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: Four spoiled animals from the New York Central Zoo escape with the unintentional help of four fugitive penguins. They subsequently find themselves in Madagascar amidst happy lemurs.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Recruited from youngsters into the global spy game, four penguins are called into action by a mysterious espionage organisation in order to save the world from a villainous octopus.

programme.title: Dolittle
programme.desc: When a young queen falls seriously ill, Dr. Dolittle sets out on an epic journey to a mythical island to find a cure, rediscovering his courage and old skills along the way with the help of new companions.

programme.title: Sylvanian Families The Movie
programme.desc: In Sylvanian village, everyone awaits the Festival of the Stars, but rabbit girl Freya worries as she must find the Tree of the Year for the main event.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie
programme.desc: Gabby's prized dollhouse falls into the hands of eccentric cat lady Vera, sending her on a real-world quest to reunite the Gabby Cats before time runs out.

programme.title: Casper
programme.desc: A woman inherits a dark, ruined mansion instead of her father’s fortune and searches for hidden treasure inside. When she encounters ghosts, she hires a specialist to remove them, but soon discovers a young friendly spirit and his more troublesome relatives, leading to an unexpected clash between the living and the dead.

programme.title: Woody Woodpecker
programme.desc: The hyperactive red-headed bird enters a turf war with a big city lawyer wanting to tear down his home in an effort to build a house to flip.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic The Hedgehog accidentally sparks the attention of super-uncool evil genius Dr. Robotnik. Now it's super-villain vs super-sonic in a race to stop Robotnik from taking over the world.

programme.title: Thunderbirds
programme.desc: The world's greatest rescue squad are trapped in space while an evil enemy works overtime.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: An egg emergency ensues when the rock 'n' roll-loving teen son of the Easter Bunny shirks his responsibility and runs away from home.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Minions Kevin, Stuart and Bob attend the 1968 Villain-Con, where they land jobs as sidekicks to supervillain Scarlet Overkill. She tells them about her evil plans to become Queen of England.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: The Bad Guys try to settle into life as Good Guys, but when an all-female criminal squad drags them out of retirement for one last job, trust and loyalty are put to the test.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: An experiment with dinosaurs created from DNA becomes a disaster when sabotage sets the prehistoric monsters loose in an island theme park.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail that has forever dreamed of the ability to move fast is granted his wish after a freak accident. Now he's out to win the Indy 500.

programme.title: Lyle, Lyle, Crocodile
programme.desc: When the Primm family moves to New York City, their young son Josh struggles to adapt to his new school and new friends. All of that changes when he discovers Lyle, a singing crocodile living in their attic.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' The Lorax
programme.desc: A young boy searches for the one thing that will enable him to win the affection of the girl of his dreams. He must discover the story of the Lorax, the creature who fights to protect his world.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: A loyal police dog and his human officer are injured on the job. A risky operation saves them by combining them into one hybrid officer. He tries to adapt to his new identity while stopping the evil cat Petter’s plans.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman

programme.title: Open Season 2

programme.title: Shrek

programme.title: Night of the Zoopocalypse
programme.desc: When a meteor unleashes a virus turning zoo animals into zombies, a wolf and mountain lion team up with survivors to save the zoo and stop a mutant leader's plan.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four high-school kids discover an old video game console and are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, learning you don't just play Jumanji, you must survive it.

programme.desc: What began as an unlikely friendship between an adolescent Viking and a fearsome Night Fury dragon has become an epic adventure spanning their lives.

programme.title: F9: The Fast Saga
programme.desc: The true meaning of family gets tested like never before as Dom Toretto takes the team on a worldwide ride with high-stakes action, old friends and a surprising new foe.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise Of Cobra
programme.desc: In Kazakhstan, a convoy carrying advanced nanotech warheads is attacked. Rescued by an elite military unit, two soldiers join the team as they track a criminal group behind the assault, uncovering a deeper conspiracy.```

programme.title: Bad Boys For Life
programme.desc: The original Bad Boys are back! After a string of assassinations and an attempt on Mike's life, he convinces a hesitant Marcus to hold off retirement and partner one last time.

programme.title: Death Race
programme.desc: In a future where extreme sports has grown into reality TV bloodlust, Jason Statham stars as a speedway champion ordered by a ruthless warden to suit up and drive, or never see his little girl again.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt must bring down a ruthless villain and rescue his fiancee.

programme.title: Dracula Untold
programme.desc: When his wife and child are in danger, a young prince from the Draculea dynasty makes a dark sacrifice to save them. He becomes the first vampire and the man who inspires the legend of Dracula.

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back
programme.desc: When an Army Major is framed for treason, Reacher discovers she's the target of a massive government conspiracy and risks everything to take down the corrupt organisation.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: When two detectives are asked to investigate the brutal murders of two federal agents, they find themselves pulled into the alluring and lethal world of drug traffickers.

programme.title: A Quiet Place
programme.desc: A family must navigate their lives in silence to avoid mysterious creatures that hunt by sound.

programme.title: Star Trek Beyond
programme.desc: Dispatched on a rescue mission to the farthest reaches of space, Captain Kirk, Spock and the crew become separated when they are ambushed with no means of escape.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Archaeologists awaken an Egyptian priest mummified alive 36 centuries ago for killing Pharaoh Seti and sleeping with his mistress. When he escapes from the tomb, he becomes a threat to the world.

programme.title: Snow White And The Huntsman
programme.desc: In a twist to the fairy tale, the evil Queen Ravenna orders the Huntsman to capture Snow White so she can rule eternally; however, he trains her in the art of war to defeat the wicked ruler.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: A beautiful CIA officer accused of being a Russian spy must go on the run to clear her name and identify a would-be presidential assassin.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: After failing to fight for his family during a robbery, an unassuming father calls on skills from his hidden past to become a lethal vigilante blazing a wild ride to revenge.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark Of The Moon
programme.desc: An event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise Of Cobra
programme.desc: In Kazakhstan, a convoy carrying advanced nanotech warheads is attacked. Rescued by an elite military unit, two soldiers join the team as they track a criminal group behind the assault, uncovering a deeper conspiracy.```

programme.title: The Fast And The Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel is sent to Japan to live with his father, he is hooked on the treacherous world of street racing.

programme.desc: The CSIs try put a body back together, after it is literally shredded.

programme.title: McLaren
programme.desc: The story of Bruce McLaren, the New Zealander who showed the world that a man of humble beginnings could take on the elite of motor racing and win.

programme.title: Six Minutes To Midnight
programme.desc: Set in the summer of 1939, "Six Minutes to Midnight" follows Thomas Miller, an English teacher at the Augusta Victoria College, a finishing school for the daughters of high-ranking Nazi officials. As World War II looms, Miller discovers a conspiracy and must navigate dangerous waters to expose the truth and protect the students.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Re-creation
programme.desc: A fictionalized courtroom trial exploring the murder of French producer Sophie Toscan du Plantier, questioning facts and debating the innocence of her convicted murderer, Ian Bailey.

programme.title: The Unlikely Pilgrimage of Harold Fry
programme.desc: Harold, a quiet and seemingly ordinary man in his sixties, is shaken when he learns that his old friend Queenie is dying in a distant hospice. On impulse, he sets out to mail a letter to her, but instead begins walking, convinced that as long as he keeps moving, she will live. His journey spans 450 miles, forcing him to confront memories, regrets, and the growing concern and loneliness of his wife, Maureen, who is left behind at home.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Hyde Park on Hudson
programme.desc: In June 1939, President Franklin Delano Roosevelt (Academy Award-nominee Bill Murray) and his wife Eleanor (Olivia Williams) host the King and Queen of England (Samuel West, Olivia Colman) for a weekend at their upstate New York vacation home. With Britain facing imminent war with Germany, the Windsors are desperately looking to FDR for support. But international affairs must be juggled with the complexities of FDR's domestic establishment, as wife, mother and mistresses all conspire to make the royal weekend an unforgettable one. Also starring Academy Award-nominee Laura Linney.

programme.title: The Almond and the Seahorse
programme.desc: What happens when you're ambushed by time? An archaeologist and an architect fight to re-imagine a future after traumatic brain injury leaves them adrift from the people they love.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Days of the Bagnold Summer
programme.desc: Coming-of-age comedy with Earl Cave as a heavy-metal-loving teenager who is forced to spend the summer with his boring old mum - Monica Dolan - in Simon Bird's debut feature.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Vita & Virginia
programme.desc: 1920s London, English writer, Virginia Woolf (Elizabeth Debicki), has reached the apex of modern world literature with her landmark novel, 'Mrs. Dalloway', but nothing seems to soothe the darkness that plagues her. Poems and letters of admiration from Vita Sackville-West (Gemma Arterton) lead to a courtship that is hardly concealed from the outside world. Soon, Virginia is enthralled by Vita. She is everything Virginia is not –extroverted, direct, in possession of a strongly magnetic personality and, as Virginia notes, a pair of the most "amazing legs". Focusing on the period 1927-1928 during which time Woolf wrote 'Orlando', the novel their relationship inspired, Vita & Virginia is a moving and exhilarating feature from actor and writer Dame Eileen Atkins.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Six Minutes To Midnight
programme.desc: Set in the summer of 1939, "Six Minutes to Midnight" follows Thomas Miller, an English teacher at the Augusta Victoria College, a finishing school for the daughters of high-ranking Nazi officials. As World War II looms, Miller discovers a conspiracy and must navigate dangerous waters to expose the truth and protect the students.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: Nothing is as it seems when an undocumented Filipina immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home. She and her daughter soon become ensnared by a terrible secret that threatens to tear them apart.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Professor and the Madman
programme.desc: Based on the 1998 book `The Surgeon of Crowthorne' by Simon Winchester, the life of Professor James Murray is portrayed as he begins work on compiling words for the first edition of the Oxford English Dictionary in the mid-19th century. As he led the overseeing committee, the professor received over 10,000 entries from one source in particular - a patient at Broadmoor Criminal Lunatic Asylum, Dr William Minor.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Unlikely Pilgrimage of Harold Fry
programme.desc: Harold, a quiet and seemingly ordinary man in his sixties, is shaken when he learns that his old friend Queenie is dying in a distant hospice. On impulse, he sets out to mail a letter to her, but instead begins walking, convinced that as long as he keeps moving, she will live. His journey spans 450 miles, forcing him to confront memories, regrets, and the growing concern and loneliness of his wife, Maureen, who is left behind at home.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: I Am Slave
programme.desc: I Am Slave reveals the shocking truth that if you're living in London today, you could be living next door to a slave. Having been kidnapped as a child and taken away from the Nuba Mountains in Sudan, young Malia finds herself being sent to London as a teenager, and made to work with no wages and no freedom in a house where they control her every move.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Days of the Bagnold Summer
programme.desc: Coming-of-age comedy with Earl Cave as a heavy-metal-loving teenager who is forced to spend the summer with his boring old mum - Monica Dolan - in Simon Bird's debut feature.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Last Days in the Desert
programme.desc: Suffused with mystery, and set against breath-taking landscapes, this bold and dramatic interpretation of the temptations of Christ explores Jesus’ confrontation with the devil in his last days fasting Judean desert. Finally contemplating a return to civilisation, and his imminent death, Jesus happens upon a troubled family dealing with a much more earthly problem: the young son being desperate to leave the familial home against his father’s wishes, in search of the big city.

programme.title: Into the White
programme.desc: Norway, WWII. A group of British and German soldiers find themselves stranded in the wild after an aircraft battle. Finding shelter in the same cabin, they realise there is only one way to survive.

programme.title: The Dinosaur Project
programme.desc: In this special effects thriller, a film crew in the Congo discover a lost world filled with terrifying, giant creatures thought extinct for millions of years.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Nothing Like a Dame
programme.desc: From time to time four old friends, all extraordinary actresses, meet up in the English countryside to gossip, to remember and to laugh. For once they let the cameras in... Nothing Like A Dame is a unique celebration of the lives and careers of four of our most iconic actresses: Dame Eileen Atkins, Dame Judi Dench, Dame Joan Plowright and Dame Maggie Smith. All four have gone from being fledgling actresses in the 1950s to acting royalty.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Colette
programme.desc: After moving to Paris, author Sidonie-Gabrielle Colette agrees to ghostwrite a semi-autobiographical novel for her husband. Its success soon inspires her to fight for creative ownership and overcome the societal constraints of the early 20th century.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Tell It To The Bees
programme.desc: Dr. Jean Markham returns to the town she left as a teenager to take over her late father's medical practice. When a school-yard scuffle lands Charlie in her surgery, she invites him to visit the hives in her garden and tell his secrets to the bees, as she once did. The new friendship between the boy and the bee keeper brings his mother Lydia into Jean's world.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Age of Heroes
programme.desc: A British army corporal is recruited into an elite commando unit under the command of a battle-hardened major during the Second World War. The soldiers are sent on a dangerous mission into occupied Norway to capture a vital German radar installation. Action adventure, with Sean Bean, Danny Dyer, Izabella Miko and James D'Arcy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Sea Fever
programme.desc: Sea Fever is a tense and original Irish sci-fi thriller reminiscent of cult classics "The Thing" and "The Abyss." For marine biology student Siobhán, it was supposed to be a research excursion with a trawler crew fishing the West Irish seas. Out in the deep Atlantic, an unfathomable life form ensnares the boat and they become marooned with a mysterious parasite infecting their water supply. Soon, the oozing force infiltrates the entire vessel and turns Siobhan's journey into a claustrophobic fight for survival. Can they stop the mysterious waterborne parasite from spreading before it's too late?

programme.title: The Show
programme.desc: A man of many talents arrives in a strange and haunted town on a mission to locate a stolen artefact for his menacing client, Fletcher finds himself entangled in a twilight world of vampires, sleeping beauties, Voodoo gangsters, noir private eyes, and masked avengers. Welcome to The Show.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Into the White
programme.desc: Norway, WWII. A group of British and German soldiers find themselves stranded in the wild after an aircraft battle. Finding shelter in the same cabin, they realise there is only one way to survive.

programme.title: The Falling
programme.desc: Intense and troubled Lydia and charismatic Abbie are best friends experiencing a sexual awakening at their strict English girls' school. Following a tragedy, a mysterious fainting epidemic breaks out. As Lydia's symptoms worsen, she rallies against the school's authorities to uncover the underlying cause of the outbreak. Eventually her actions force old secrets to rise to the surface and she finds herself faced with a truth that she never expected.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Nothing Like a Dame

All four have gone from being fledgling actresses in the 1950s to acting royalty.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Lies We Tell
programme.desc: An heiress is forced to embrace her family's dark legacy, but the wolves begin to circle when she does. Gothic period drama, starring Agnes O'Casey

programme.title: Age of Heroes
programme.desc: A British army corporal is recruited into an elite commando unit under the command of a battle-hardened major during the Second World War. The soldiers are sent on a dangerous mission into occupied Norway to capture a vital German radar installation. Action adventure, with Sean Bean, Danny Dyer, Izabella Miko and James D'Arcy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.desc: Sea Fever is a tense and original Irish sci-fi thriller reminiscent of cult classics "The Thing" and "The Abyss." For marine biology student Siobhán, it was supposed to be a research excursion with a trawler crew fishing the West Irish seas. programme.title: The Descent
programme.desc: A woman goes on vacation with her friends after her husband and daughter encounter a tragic accident. One year later she goes hiking with her friends and they get trapped in the cave. With a lack of supply, they struggle to survive and they meet strange blood thirsty creatures.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Oranges and Sunshine
programme.desc: Oranges and Sunshine tells the real-life story of Margaret Humphreys, a social worker from Nottingham, who uncovered one of the most significant social scandals in recent times: the organised deportation of children in care from the United Kingdom to Australia. Almost single-handedly, against overwhelming odds and with little regard for her own well-being, Margaret reunited thousands of families.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Happy Prince
programme.desc: In a cheap Parisian hotel, Oscar Wilde lies on his death bed and recalls his past with wit and irony. Was he once the most famous man in London? He reviews the failed attempt to reconcile with his long-suffering wife, the ensuing reprisal of his fatal love affair with Lord Alfred Douglas and the devotion of Robbie Ross, who tried and failed to save him from himself.

programme.title: Summerland
programme.desc: During World War II, reclusive writer Alice has her sequestered life upended when Frank, an evacuee from the London Blitz, is left in her care.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Ammonite
programme.desc: In the 1840s, acclaimed self-taught palaeontologist Mary Anning works alone on the wild and brutal Southern English coastline of Lyme Regis. The days of her famed discoveries behind her, she now hunts for common fossils to sell to rich tourists to support herself and her ailing widowed mother. When one such tourist, Roderick Murchison, arrives in Lyme on the first leg of a European tour, he entrusts Mary with the care of his young wife Charlotte, who is recuperating from a personal tragedy. Mary, whose life is a daily struggle on the poverty line, cannot afford to turn him down but, proud and relentlessly passionate about her work, she clashes with her unwanted guest. They are two women from utterly different worlds. Yet despite the chasm between their social spheres and personalities, Mary and Charlotte discover they can each offer what the other has been searching for: the realisation that they are not alone. It is the beginning of a passionate and all-consuming love affair that will defy all social bounds and alter the course of both lives irrevocably.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Beats
programme.desc: In 1994 Scotland, two teenage friends share a final night out together before life will take them in two different directions.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Liability
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Adam agrees to do a day's driving for his mum's gangster boyfriend Peter, it takes him on a 24-hour journey into a nightmarish world of murder, sex trafficking and revenge, in the company of aging hit man Roy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Tommy's Honour
programme.desc: Drama depicting the relationship between golfing champions Old Tom Morris and his son.

programme.title: Another Year
programme.desc: Jim Broadbent and Ruth Sheen star in Mike Leigh's Oscar and BAFTA-nominated comedy-drama about a contented couple and their less fortunate friends and family. Strong language.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Professor and the Madman
programme.desc: Based on the 1998 book `The Surgeon of Crowthorne' by Simon Winchester, the life of Professor James Murray is portrayed as he begins work on compiling words for the first edition of the Oxford English Dictionary in the mid-19th century. As he led the overseeing committee, the professor received over 10,000 entries from one source in particular - a patient at Broadmoor Criminal Lunatic Asylum, Dr William Minor.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Best Offer
programme.desc: Virgil Oldman is a world renowned antiques expert. One day he receives a phone call from the mysterious Claire who asks him to evaluate some family works of art. It will be the beginning of a relationship that will change his life forever.

programme.title: 6 Days
programme.desc: Following the armed seizure of the Iranian Embassy in London in April 1980, six tense days unfold as negotiations fail and fear grips the city. Inside, hostages endure uncertainty while outside, elite SAS commandos meticulously plan a daring rescue mission. The operation, executed with precision and bravery, becomes a defining moment in British military history, showcasing courage, discipline, and the power of swift, decisive action under extreme pressure.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: A Medieval 'Magnificent Seven', that combines the visceral, stylized action of '300' with the impassioned heroism and romance of 'Braveheart'. Starring James Purefoy (Solomon Kane), Brian Cox (The Bourne Supremacy), and Paul Giamatti (Shoot 'Em Up), IRONCLAD is an ultra-violent action thriller that tells the true story of a motley crew of tough, battle hardened warriors, who withstood several brutal and bloody months under siege, in a desperate bid to defend their country's freedom...
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Descent: Part 2
programme.desc: Distraught, confused, and half-wild with fear, Sarah Carter emerges alone from the Appalachian cave system where she encountered unspeakable terrors. Unable to plausibly explain to the authorities what happened - or why she's covered in her friends' blood - Sarah is forced back to the subterranean depths to help locate her five missing companions.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mr. Holmes
programme.desc: Academy Award® nominee Ian McKellen takes on the iconic role of Detective Sherlock Holmes in this exciting new twist on the world’s most famous detective. In 1947, the world famous sleuth has retired to a remote Sussex farmhouse, living in relative anonymity with only his housekeeper Mrs Munro and her young son, Roger, for company. Grappling with the diminishing powers of his mind — and frustrated with the misrepresentation of him in Watson’s best-selling novels — he diverts his attention to an unsolved case. As the mystery deepens, Sherlock tries desperately to recall the events of 30 years ago that ultimately led to his retirement.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Almond and the Seahorse
programme.desc: What happens when you're ambushed by time? An archaeologist and an architect fight to re-imagine a future after traumatic brain injury leaves them adrift from the people they love.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: A Little Chaos
programme.desc: A romantic drama following Sabine (Academy Award®-winner Kate Winslet), a strong-willed and talented landscape designer, who is chosen to build one of the main gardens at King Louis XIV's new palace at Versailles. In her new position of power, she challenges gender and class barriers while also becoming professionally and romantically entangled with the court's renowned landscape artist André Le Notre (Matthias Schoenaerts).
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Death Defying Acts
programme.desc: Houdini starts an affair with a psychic out to con the famous escapologist. As the stakes get higher, it soon becomes a question of who is out-conning who - when the biggest risk is falling in love.

programme.title: The Miracle Club
programme.desc: In 1967, three generations of spirited friends from Dublin chase miracles on a pilgrimage to Lourdes — and navigate unexpected revelations along the way.

programme.title: Allelujah
programme.desc: ALLELUJAH is a warm, humorous, and deeply moving story about surviving old age. When the geriatric ward in a small Yorkshire hospital is threatened with closure, the hospital decides to fight back. ALLELUJAH celebrates the spirit of the elderly patients whilst paying tribute to the deep humanity of the medical staff battling with limited resources and ever-growing demand
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Hurricane
programme.desc: Polish pilots overcome prejudice to fight against the Luftwaffe with the Royal Air Force during the Second World War, in the hope of protecting both Great Britain and their own Poland from the German advance.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

Leading the cast is the self-absorbed actor Ambrose Hilliard, who is persuaded to coach the handsome young American hero who has been 'parachuted' into the acting profession - but that will only be when the script is produced.

programme.desc: The orphanage where Jake and Elwood were raised will be sold unless the tax on the property is paid within days. The brothers decide to raise the money by putting their band back together.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: A police chief, a marine scientist and a grizzled fisherman set out to stop a giant shark when it starts menacing the small island community of Amity.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: With the help of a seismology student, Val and Earl discover their desolate town is infested with huge man-eating creatures living below the ground. The race is on to defeat these slimy subterraneans.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Forced into slavery by the corrupt heir to the throne, Roman general Maximus becomes a gladiator. His prowess in the arena leads him to Rome, the Colosseum, and a showdown with the new emperor.

programme.title: Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell Of Fear
programme.desc: Frank Drebin, the idiot detective, uncovers a plot by super villain Robert Goulet to sabotage the USA's energy policy. More slapstick mayhem in the first sequel to the comedy classic.

programme.title: Nutty Professor 2: The Klumps
programme.desc: Sherman Klump's getting married but his alter-ego, Buddy Love, is a problem. He steals Sherman's fountain of youth formula and tangles with the whole Klump family.

programme.title: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: Five high school students meet in Saturday detention and discover how they have a great deal more in common than they thought.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: Brewster's Millions
programme.desc: Montgomery Brewster is a minor league baseball pitcher who discovers he has to blow $30 million in 30 days as a condition to inherit a much greater fortune.

programme.title: Scrooged
programme.desc: This surreal update of the Charles Dickens classic has a mean-spirited TV executive haunted into the Christmas spirit by three special time-travellers.

programme.title: The Patriot

programme.title: The River Wild
programme.desc: An expert rafter takes her family for a day out on the river. But when two bank robbers hijack their raft it turns into a white-water knuckle-biter.

programme.title: A League Of Their Own
programme.desc: The story of an All-American Girls' Professional Baseball League formed in 1943 when the men were away at war.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: The Money Pit
programme.desc: Walter and Anna believe they've arrived 'home sweet home' when they buy the house of their dreams. But life quickly becomes a nightmare as their dilapidated mansion falls apart around them.

programme.title: Indiana Jones: Kingdom of Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Back in a new globe-trotting adventure, the Soviets kidnap Indiana in Mexico as they plot to harness the power of the Crystal Skull of Akator in the Cold War.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part II
programme.desc: Daniel, now a karate champ, goes to Okinawa with Mr Miyagi, his mentor. Miyagi rekindles an old flame while Daniel finds love (and enemies) of his own. Ralph Macchio and Pat Morita team up again.
